title: Fiery Italian Vegetables Casserole
description: A spicy, savory, and satisfying vegetarian Italian casserole featuring Thai green curry paste.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and sauté the onion, mushrooms, bell peppers, and zucchini until the vegetables are tender.
Add the Thai green curry paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Stir in the tomato sauce and bring the mixture to a simmer.
In a separate saucepan, make the bechamel sauce by melting the butter over medium heat and whisking in the flour.
Slowly pour in the milk, whisking constantly, and cook until the sauce thickens.
Add the mozzarella and Parmesan cheese to the bechamel sauce and stir until melted.
In a 9x13-inch baking dish, arrange a layer of the vegetable mixture.
Pour half of the bechamel sauce over the vegetables.
Repeat the layers, starting with the vegetables, then the bechamel sauce.
Top the casserole with the chopped fresh basil and grated Parmesan cheese.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 15-20 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
